text: 检查下面英文的语法In 2020, DUAN [13] proposed a SMOTE + Random Forest(RF) scheme, this scheme first uses SMOTE for data enhancement to solve the data imbalance, and then uses random forest as a classifier to classify the power consumption curve, DUAN's scheme can effectively improve the accuracy rate compared with the traditional SVM and RF. Then, DUAN's scheme does not address the problem of the existence of some minority class points or outliers in the region where the majority class distribution is accurately modeled when using SMOTE for data augmentation. Also due to random forest in problems with multiple categorical variables, random forest may not improve the accuracy of the base learner [14].

In the same style of my old debriefing, create a new debriefing for me based on the new case that I have:

GP Waiting Room
Patients in the waiting room of a general practitioner (family doctor) sometimes have to wait for their turn. The patients do not know beforehand how long they'll have to wait. This might make patients nervous. How can you shorten the experienced waiting time of patients in a waiting room?

Debriefing
Our duo, Odyssey, got the second case for our assignment: ‘no more toys’. We will be developing a digital solution to address the challenge of excessive toy clutter in households. We aim to create an innovative digital tool that will help parents and children to manage and reduce the number of unused toys at home, potentially saving money and space. Using the methods from designkit.com and cmdmethods.nl, we will explore the opportunities and challenges of creating a mobile app that could enhance the way kids interact with toys.

text:
Write an OVERALL REFLECTION AND SELF-APPRAISAL of a student who wrote the following: To the readers,

In my portfolio, I will be writing about the unforgettable experiences, valuable learnings, and lifelong values I have gained in my work immersion experience as an intern for the Engineering department with the InterContinental Regency Bahrain hotel. In this portfolio, you will read the journey through the eyes of the student Xian Iver R. Pasamonte. 

From the moment I stepped into the InterContinental Regency Bahrain, I was greeted with warmth and hospitality. Being a student of the STEM strand, I was thrilled to have the opportunity to work with the hotel`s expert team of engineers and learn from their vast experience in the field. My work immersion has provided me with invaluable insight into the day-to-day operations of the hotel`s engineering department. 

Over the course of my immersion, I have been exposed to a wide range of engineering skills and techniques, from handling basic maintenance tasks to overseeing complex repairs. Not only have I gained technical knowledge from my experience in the hotel, but also important values such as teamwork, professionalism, and attention to detail. 

I have gained from working with different people and departments, such as painting, electricity repair, and air conditioning operation, will be discussed. As a result of this experience, I have gained a deeper understanding of the importance of engineering in the hospitality industry, and I am motivated to pursue a career in it. 

Through my portfolio, I hope to inspire and encourage students to always take opportunities whenever it is presented. Thank you for taking the time to read my journey.
